name: Wrongful Death Benefits in Machine Accidents

mainEntity.name: Benefits if machine accident causes death in Centerville?
mainEntity.text: Benefits if machine accident causes death in Centerville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dependency benefits: 66.67% wages to spouse/kids for 10 years or life, plus burial costs up to $10,000.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: File promptly; Labor Commission determines dependents. Excludes fault. Centerville families get priority processing.[4][2]

description: Dependency benefits: 66.67% wages to spouse/kids for 10 years or life, plus burial costs up to $10,000.[4]
